source_context: User-provided playoff adjustment notes and prop angles. Logged as initial qualitative slate context before market/lineup validation.

initial_adjustments: Toronto returns home with strong post-All-Star home scoring profile.
Brandon Ingram expected to become higher-usage focal point at home.
Cleveland still leans heavily on Donovan Mitchell usage and shot volume.
risk_flags: Home-court narrative may already be priced

initial_adjustments: Wembanyama status is the slate hinge point.
If Wembanyama sits or is limited, San Antonio usage redistributes to De'Aaron Fox, Stephon Castle, and Devin Vassell.
Portland home playoff energy creates upset/pace volatility.
risk_flags: Do not lock Spurs/POR market before official status
Home-energy angle can inflate Portland pricing

initial_adjustments: Atlanta home environment after series split.
Dyson Daniels and Nickeil Alexander-Walker defensive pressure on Brunson remains key.
Recent SharpEdge rebound reads have been strong on Josh Hart/Dyson Daniels, but KAT rebound volatility remains dangerous.
risk_flags: KAT rebound under trap after 17 rebound spike
Brunson suppression may flip into whistle-heavy scoring game

initial_adjustments: Embiid out creates rim-protection downgrade for Philadelphia.
Boston can collapse paint and create kickout threes.
Derrick White expected to see more structured perimeter opportunities.

hunt_targets.lean: OVER candidate if PHI rim protection craters

risk_flags: Boston blowout can cap starter minutes

initial_adjustments: Houston young guards may struggle with playoff physicality.
Lakers likely continue half-court pressure and glass control emphasis.
Rui Hachimura mask/role note is tracked but not actionable without usage/minutes confirmation.
risk_flags: Rebound market correlation if pairing same game
Need starting lineup and player tracking from prior games
Houston pace surge can break total under

execution_rules: No lock without current line, price, injury confirmation, and lineup/minutes context.
Prioritize markets with a measurable model/market probability gap, not narrative only.
For LiveFlow, use stripped single-fire mode unless explicitly building a boosted card.
Avoid more than two correlated plays from the same segment or game cluster.
next_required_inputs: Current gamelines and team totals for each target game.
Confirmed injury status for Embiid and Wembanyama.
Player prop boards for rebounds, points, assists, and 3PM on the named targets.
Projected minutes or confirmed rotations where available.
